textByHash.fe2ea5f9d18d88d83993f578421fc21ef6f1ed58: Hello there. Don't see many people around here. The name's Garl.
textByHash.70a215208d0a993cf5a9247988d954f6080ac037: Exploring. Until that Nomad chap opened things up, this island was abandoned. Who knows what could be hiding here.
textByHash.71b34d16d48f80b182fd578831cf5affd6848f21: Well there's a dungeon on the east side of the island. I haven't gone too far in though. There's also a tower to the north west, near my camp.
textByHash.c617093287c20b1c0b36035b7c27c2c4b8ecfd1c: There's no shortage of resources either. Though there's not really any way to process them. I tried to build a spinning wheel and a pottery wheel myself, but they broke.
textByHash.f86b404bef4216ab10979d5b00ea3f55b90dcb2c: Indeed. It's all very peaceful. And yet...
textByHash.3e327d3bf83586bc502f96cd0ee6475ab651c0a5: I don't know. Something just seems amiss. There's something sinister about this place. I just don't really know what.
textByHash.dba2f674c2fd38565142a1bc16ab3b2e765c23b6: You're probably right. Anyway, I'll let you get on. All the best.
